$comment: Agent Identity Studio demo identities — the saved inputs and pipeline outputs behind three.ws/agent-identities. Each entry is a REAL run of the production pipeline (scripts/okx-identity-demo.mjs); results are written back here by the script, never by hand.

identities.brief: A meticulous on-chain accounting agent that reconciles wallets and flags anomalies in real time. Calm, precise, incorruptible — dresses like a sharp auditor from the future.
identities.styleHints: deep navy and silver palette, brushed-metal accents, subtle circuit-trace pinstripes

identities.brief: A flamboyant generative-art muse that turns raw ideas into finished galleries. Playful, extravagant, a walking canvas with paint still drying.
identities.styleHints: iridescent fabrics, paint-splash gradients, asymmetric couture silhouette

identities.brief: A high-frequency momentum trading bot built for speed and discipline. Aggressive but never reckless; reads order books like sheet music.
identities.styleHints: matte-black exoskeleton with ember-orange telemetry lines and a narrow visor

identities.brief: The 3D identity studio of three.ws: an artisan engineer agent that forges avatars, rigs skeletons, and lights studio renders for other AI agents. Equal parts craftsman and machine.
identities.styleHints: charcoal work jacket with violet and cyan accents, holographic measuring tools, craftsman apron
